accepted.reason: Variable-code parsing and support-validation logic provide mixed string parsing and structured loop kernels.

2D polynomial multiply/integrate/derivative loops are high-signal nested numeric kernels.
Moving-average filters are common streaming kernels with straightforward loop optimization behavior.
Procedural generation with adaptive difficulty contains practical branch-heavy sequence update logic.
